summary: Noise floor pre-committed to numeric ±2 nT for all 9 stations (consistent with INTERMAGNET 1-min H-component RMS noise during Kp<2 conditions). Recorded in new noise_floor_pre_commitment block under contents top-level. OBS-D-02 now references this threshold explicitly. Procedural alternative (2-sigma over 30 quiet days) is preserved for record but not the falsification trigger; the simpler numeric threshold is the OTS-cleaner choice.
note_to_decider: Rev2 of EXP-283 addresses all six curmudgeon-flagged blockers (ISS-1801..1806) from queue_id=294 review. Recommend (a) close all six issues as fixed-by-revision, (b) re-route EXP-283 to curmudgeon for confirmation pass before OTS anchoring (revision_required=false in tracker, requires_frozen_prediction_review=true unchanged). Do NOT proceed to OTS anchoring until curmudgeon confirms rev2 closes the blockers.
